questionHtml: Calculate, to four significant figures, the concentration, in μg kg−1, of vanadium in oil giving a signal intensity of 14 950.
markschemeHtml:
«14 950 = 392.19x + 147.62»

x = 37.74 «μg kg–1»

 

Answer must be given to four significant figures.

Do not accept values obtained directly from the graph.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Calculate, to four significant figures, the concentration, in μg kg−1, of vanadium in oil giving a signal intensity of 14 950.
breadcrumbLabels: A.2 Metals and inductively coupled plasma (ICP) spectroscopy
